title: Vejalpur Heat Wave
lead: Vejalpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.89. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vejalpur has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has resulted in no Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating no need for heating, and has severely impacted the city's conditions.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
